'''鈭歫-z-sh''' ('''kajazash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zombify|zombify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-z-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zombify|zombify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-z-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kajazash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijazash|thijazash]] || [[word:jijazash|jijazash]] || [[word:shijazash|shijazash]] || [[word:kijazash|kijazash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujazash|thuthujazash]] || [[word:jujujazash|jujujazash]] || [[word:shushujazash|shushujazash]] || [[word:kukujazash|kukujazash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujazash|thujazash]] || [[word:jujazash|jujazash]] || [[word:shujazash|shujazash]] || [[word:kujazash|kujazash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujazash|thujazash]] || [[word:jujazash|jujazash]] || [[word:shujazash|shujazash]] || [[word:kujazash|kujazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejazash|thejazash]] || [[word:jejazash|jejazash]] || [[word:shejazash|shejazash]] || [[word:kejazash|kejazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojazash|thothojazash]] || [[word:jojojazash|jojojazash]] || [[word:shoshojazash|shoshojazash]] || [[word:kokojazash|kokojazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojazash|thojazash]] || [[word:jojazash|jojazash]] || [[word:shojazash|shojazash]] || [[word:kojazash|kojazash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojazash|thojazash]] || [[word:jojazash|jojazash]] || [[word:shojazash|shojazash]] || [[word:kojazash|kojazash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]] || [[word:jazash|jazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙jazash|th忙jazash]] || [[word:j忙jazash|j忙jazash]] || [[word:sh忙jazash|sh忙jazash]] || [[word:k忙jazash|k忙jazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajazash|thathajazash]] || [[word:jajajazash|jajajazash]] || [[word:shashajazash|shashajazash]] || [[word:kakajazash|kakajazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajazash|thajazash]] || [[word:jajazash|jajazash]] || [[word:shajazash|shajazash]] || [[word:kajazash|kajazash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajazash|thajazash]] || [[word:jajazash|jajazash]] || [[word:shajazash|shajazash]] || [[word:kajazash|kajazash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajazash|shajazash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajazash|goshajazash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajazash|gokishajazash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajazashn眉|shajazashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajazashnkn眉|goshajazashnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazashn眉|gokishajazashn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajazashsh毛|shajazashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajazashnksh毛|goshajazashnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajazashsh毛|gokishajazashsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazashro|shajazashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazashnkro|goshajazashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazashro|gokishajazashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazashmu|shajazashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazashnkmu|goshajazashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazashmu|gokishajazashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajazashsher|shajazashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajazashnksher|goshajazashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajazashsher|gokishajazashsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajazashng|shajazashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajazashnkng|goshajazashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajazashng|gokishajazashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajazashya|shajazashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajazashnkya|goshajazashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajazashya|gokishajazashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajazashyam|shajazashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajazashnkyam|goshajazashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajazashyam|gokishajazashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazashn眉sh毛|shajazashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazashnkn眉sh毛|goshajazashnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazashn眉sh毛|gokishajazashn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazashn眉ro|shajazashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazashnkn眉ro|goshajazashnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazashn眉ro|gokishajazashn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazashn眉mu|shajazashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazashnkn眉mu|goshajazashnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazashn眉mu|gokishajazashn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazashsh毛n眉|shajazashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazashnksh毛n眉|goshajazashnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazashsh毛n眉|gokishajazashsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazashsh毛ro|shajazashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazashnksh毛ro|goshajazashnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazashsh毛ro|gokishajazashsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazashsh毛mu|shajazashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazashnksh毛mu|goshajazashnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazashsh毛mu|gokishajazashsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazashron眉|shajazashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazashnkron眉|goshajazashnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazashron眉|gokishajazashron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazashrosh毛|shajazashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazashnkrosh毛|goshajazashnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazashrosh毛|gokishajazashrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajazashromu|shajazashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajazashnkromu|goshajazashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajazashromu|gokishajazashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajazashmun眉|shajazashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajazashnkmun眉|goshajazashnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajazashmun眉|gokishajazashmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajazashmush毛|shajazashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajazashnkmush毛|goshajazashnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajazashmush毛|gokishajazashmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajazashmuro|shajazashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajazashnkmuro|goshajazashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajazashmuro|gokishajazashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
